name: Road Veteran
description: Years on the road have toughened this artist up. World tours drain less stamina.

name: Crowd Pleaser
description: This artist just knows how to work a room. Starts every concert with a boost to star power.

name: Resilient
description: Setbacks roll off this artist like water. Stamina penalties from bad outcomes are softened.

name: Quick Learner
description: Every decent show is a lesson. Solid performances pay out a little more than usual.

name: Headliner
description: Born to be the main act. Earns a bonus when performing without a supporting lineup.

name: Viral Moment
description: One incredible night can change everything. Great performances earn significantly more credits.

name: Fan Favourite
description: The fans adore this artist. Each standout performance permanently boosts their star power.

name: Trend Setter
description: Always ahead of the curve. Star power grows steadily the longer this artist stays in the lineup.

name: Chart Topper
description: Mainstream appeal that translates directly to revenue. All payouts get a small boost.

name: Social Butterfly
description: Effortlessly sociable on and off stage. This artist moves through tours without burning out as fast.

name: Side Hustle
description: Always finding ways to make money on the side. Earns a flat credit bonus at the end of every tour.

name: Battle Hardened
description: This artist has seen it all. Terrible outcomes hit a little less hard.

name: Collab King
description: Thrives alongside other artists. Earns a payout bonus when the lineup has more than one artist type.

name: Grind Mentality
description: No days off. This artist's relentless work ethic gives them a permanently higher stamina pool.

name: Street Cred
description: Even a bad night keeps the reputation intact. Softens the blow of the worst concert outcomes.

name: Stage Diver
description: Unpredictable and electric. Great shows pay out more, but this artist plays with fire every night.

name: Encore Machine
description: Leaves the crowd wanting more every time. Earns a bonus when a concert ends on a high.

name: Burnout Prone
description: Performs with everything they have, every night. More stamina than most, but burns out faster.

name: Riff Lord
description: A natural on stage. This artist's raw charisma gives them a permanent star power advantage.

name: Amp It Up
description: Gets better as the tour goes on. Payouts grow with each concert completed in a single tour.
